footer.description: Creative tools to transform ideas into visual results.
footer.adDisclosure: Alfora is free and may receive voluntary contributions to continue growing.

socialDesigner.title: Social Designer
socialDesigner.description: Create posts, stories, ads and banners with text, images, shapes and effects.

imageEnhancer.title: Image enhancer
imageEnhancer.description: Improve sharpness, clarity, contrast and noise, then compare the result before and after.

glassGenerator.title: Translucent effect generator
glassGenerator.description: Create glassmorphism cards with blur, transparency, borders, shadows and ready-to-use CSS.

elementSeparator.title: Element separator
elementSeparator.description: Trace an element, isolate it on a transparent background and download it as a PNG.
